title: TechnologyService
description: An externally visible unit of technology functionality exposed to other technology elements, per ArchiMate 3.2 TechnologyService. Encapsulates a discrete infrastructure capability — such as compute, storage, messaging, caching, identity, or monitoring — that is made available through a defined interface. Unlike application services, a TechnologyService operates at the infrastructure tier: it is consumed by application components or other technology services, not directly by end users or business processes.

serviceType.description: Infrastructure service category, aligned with cloud provider service classifications (IaaS/PaaS/SaaS) per ArchiMate 3.2 TechnologyService.
